summary: The matchKmers function in chromVAR can be used to make an annotation matrix for all kmers of a given length.
The computeVariability function returns a data frame that contains the variability (standard deviation of the z scores) across all cell or samples for a set of peaks.
The computeVariability function returns bootstrap confidence intervals for variability by resampling cells or samples.
The computeVariability function returns a p-value for the variability being greater than the null hypothesis of 1.
